subcodes.first_line: O Aunt! The Tongue of the All-Merciful proclaimeth: The fragrances of thy love have been inhaled, and the tokens of thy sincerity are manifest before the Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عمه لسان رحمن میفرماید نفحات محبتت استشمام شد و مراتب خلوصت لدی العرش
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @love of God
